title: agrostis umbellata
intro: Agrostis umbellata, also known as umbrella grass or pinegrass, is a species of grass native to North America. Traditionally, Agrostis umbellata has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agrostis umbellata are said to include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and treating digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for use as a medicinal treatment.
